summary: Decode Printing Press `_pp_binary` response envelopes before writing raw command output so exported archives are usable bytes.
reason: Amplitude event exports return binary archive data. The shared client preserves binary bodies as base64 JSON envelopes; raw-output commands must decode that envelope before writing stdout or `--deliver file:<path>` captures JSON instead of the archive.
validated_outcome: `go test ./...`, `cli-printing-press publish validate`, `verify-skill`, and `verify-publish-package` pass with unit coverage for binary-envelope decode and pass-through JSON behavior.
